scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:api && vitest run tests/integration
scripts.page-relations:test: vitest run tests/unit/page-relations.test.ts tests/unit/page-reference-assets.test.mjs tests/unit/page-reference-migrations.test.mjs tests/unit/page-relation-backfill.test.ts tests/unit/system-page-relations.test.ts tests/unit/page-list-subpage-ui.test.ts tests/unit/save-ai-dsl-assets-block.test.ts tests/unit/list-mokelay-page-jsons-block.test.ts tests/unit/resolve-layout-bundle-block.test.ts tests/integration/page-relations-dialects.test.ts
scripts.page-relations:deploy-check: npm run page-relations:check && npm run typecheck && npm run page-relations:test && npm run build
scripts.deploy:check: npm run page-relations:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
